hero.title: Murilo Sanches
hero.subtitle: I turn complex requirements into fast, accessible, and polished interfaces.

about.title: About
about.description: Front-end developer with 4+ years of experience. I enjoy turning complex requirements into fast, accessible, polished interfaces — with a strong focus on performance, DX, and consistent delivery.

next.description: A PoC to practice Next.js, exploring SSR/CSR and API integration in a clean, simple flow.

poizoni.description: Mobile app to identify venomous animals and guide the best next steps for care and treatment.

ecommerceCar.description: Front-end of an e-commerce platform for selling automotive parts, built with TypeScript.

newsGamification.description: Front-end for a news platform with gamification mechanics to engage readers through points and achievements.

portfolioSvelte.description: Personal portfolio built with Svelte, exploring the framework's reactivity and lightweight bundle.

solarSystem.description: Interactive 3D solar system simulation rendered on HTML5 Canvas using JavaScript.

blockchain.description: Web 3.0 application integrating React with blockchain, allowing crypto transactions via MetaMask.

musicPlayer.description: Music player integrated with the Spotify API, featuring playlist management and playback controls.

ciet.description: Front-end development with React/TypeScript on large-scale projects, focused on quality, testing, and continuous architecture improvement.
keyPoints: Built responsive and dynamic web interfaces using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Redux, and Axios.
Created and maintained unit tests (Jest/Vitest) to ensure stability and safe changes.
Supported technical planning and mentoring interns, helping the team deliver consistently.
achievements: Migrated a project from Node.js 12 + CRA to Node.js 18 + Vite.
Designed and delivered an application using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

dextra.description: Worked as a front-end developer using React on a project for Alelo, collaborating closely with the team and focusing on incremental delivery.

cotuca.course: High school + technical degree in IT
